name: Contractor canary — onboarding + payment end-to-end
description: Onboarded company with one payment-ready contractor provisioned by the scenario itself (address + onboarding_status=onboarding_completed). The payment canary submits a payment against this contractor. The base demo's seeded contractor is left in its default (un-onboarded) state and is filtered out of the Pay Contractors list. Onboarding canaries (individual + business) create their own contractors through the UI and do not rely on this decoration.
